scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8787 npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:workers && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:workers: cd workers && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:workers && npm run test:frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:workers && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=debate-panel
scripts.typecheck: cd workers && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.postinstall: cd workers && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
